en: Thelma, a small pony with big dreams, wants to become a famous musician alongside her bandmates,
Otis and Reggie, in their group The Rusty Buckets.
After being rejected at an audition because of her appearance,
Thelma accidentally steps on a carrot and sticks it on her head, pretending to be a unicorn.
At that moment, a clumsy truck driver spills glitter and pink paint all over her,
transforming her into a sparkling unicorn lookalike.
Shocked by her new look, Thelma realizes she now resembles a real unicorn.
Soon, a huge crowd gathers at the farm, eager to see her, believing she's the real deal.
Seizing the moment, Thelma calls her friends to grab their instruments,
knowing this is their big break.
As she sings, she skyrockets to fame,
even catching the attention of the world's top music producers.
Meanwhile, Nikki, a famous singer, is furious as Thelma's sudden rise.
Desperate to protect her status, Nikki demands her manager dig up any dirt on Thelma
that could ruin her image and sabotage her newfound fame.
